items.claim: Santiago Ponzzinibio is 39 years old and past his prime.
items.quote: Santiago Ponzanibio, who's 39 years old, who I think is just completely washed

items.claim: Santiago Ponzzinibio has a compromised chin and has taken a lot of recent damage.
items.quote: extremely chinny. I mean, if you're getting hurt by guys like Daniel Rodriguez, Alex Morono, and Carl Harris... He's taken a ton of damage these last five fights.

items.claim: Patterson possesses significant punching power and an elite submission game.
items.quote: Patterson has a ton of power in his hands, and obviously an elite submission game as well.

items.claim: Patterson fights with his chin up in the air and poor defensive posture.
items.quote: Patterson does have that tall man chin up in the air defense
